/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o -o app  /usr/lib/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.68 /usr/lib/libglm.a
